title: Chartered Institute of Plumbing and Heating Engineering
body: The Chartered Institute of Plumbing and Heating Engineering (CIPHE) is the professional body for the plumbing and heating industry in the United Kingdom. It was founded as the Institute of Plumbers in 1906. It received a royal charter in 2008. It has more than 7,500 members.
categories: Companies based in the London Borough of Havering
Professional associations based in the United Kingdom
